haitian_creole.design_5_fossil_energy_mix: Konsevwa yon melanj ak <5% enèji fosil
haitian_creole.get_ai_analysis_of_your_mix: Jwenn yon analiz AI melanj ou
haitian_creole.build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Konstwi yon melanj solisyon ki totalize 200+ Gt
haitian_creole.zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Zewo emisyon! Janm ou se motè ki pi ekolojik la.
haitian_creole.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Vwayaj pataje — anviwon 0,3 kg CO₂ pou chak elèv pou chak vwayaj.
haitian_creole.a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: Yon machin emèt ~0,21 kg CO₂/km. Vwayaj pou kont ou anpile vit.
haitian_creole.splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Pataje vwayaj yo redwi emisyon pa moun ak 50-75%.
haitian_creole.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Fwi, legim, grenn, pwa — pi ba anprent manje a.
haitian_creole.a_mix_of_everything: Yon ti kras nan tout bagay
haitian_creole.some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Yon ti vyann, yon ti legim. Rejim mwayen.
haitian_creole.beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Vyann bèf pwodwi 60 kg CO₂ pou chak kg vyann.
haitian_creole.what_powers_your_home: Kisa ki bay kay ou kouran?
haitian_creole.us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: Rezo Etazini: ~0,4 kg CO₂ pou chak kWh.
haitian_creole.coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Rezo ki chaje ak chabon: jiska 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
haitian_creole.composting_diverts_methane_producing_w: Konpòstaj devye fatra ki pwodwi metàn.
haitian_creole.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Resiklaj sove ~1 tòn CO₂ pou chak tòn materyèl.
haitian_creole.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote: Dechaj yo pwodwi metàn (28× pi pwisan pase CO₂).
haitian_creole.drive_solo_avg_25_km_trip: Kondwi pou kont ou (vwayaj mwayen 25 km)
haitian_creole.typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Machin gazolin tipik Etazini: 0,21 kg CO₂e/km.
haitian_creole.carpool_of_3_cuts_per_person_emissions: Yon machin pataje ak 3 moun redwi emisyon pa moun ak 65%.
haitian_creole.electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Ray elektrik la 4× pi pwòp pase yon machin.
haitian_creole.improves_as_the_grid_decarbonizes: Amelyore pandan rezo a ap dekabonize.
haitian_creole.zero_emissions_also_health_benefits: Zewo emisyon. Epi benefis pou sante tou.
haitian_creole.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Avyasyon gen yon enpak rechofman 2-3× pi gwo pase CO₂ pou kont li.
haitian_creole.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Yon vwayaj ale-retou lwen = ~3 tòn — yon ane kondwi pou anpil moun.
haitian_creole.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e pou chak kg vyann bèf — pi wo nan tout manje.
haitian_creole.second_highest_emitter_after_beef: Dezyèm pi gwo emetè, apre vyann bèf.
haitian_creole.lowest_emission_meat: Vyann ki gen pi ba emisyon.
haitian_creole.varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Varye: somon leve pi wo, mòr sovaj pi ba.
haitian_creole.dairy_cattle_also_produce_methane: Bèf lèt yo pwodwi metàn tou.
haitian_creole.about_1_10_the_impact_of_a_beef_meal: Anviwon 1/10 enpak yon manje ak vyann bèf.
haitian_creole.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Pwa + diri + legim = pi ba anprent posib.
haitian_creole.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Gode jetab yo ajoute ~50% konpare ak kafe fèt lakay.
haitian_creole.gas_heating_running_1_hr: Chofaj gaz k ap mache (1 è)
haitian_creole.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gaz natirèl: ~2 kg/therm. Sèlman nan sezon fredi.
haitian_creole.us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: Mwayèn rezo Etazini; pi ba nan CA, pi wo nan WV.
haitian_creole.4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnace: 4× pi efikas pase yon founo gaz.
haitian_creole.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Rapò Netflix 2023 — pi ba pase ansyen estimasyon yo.
haitian_creole.4k_uses_4_the_bandwidth_of_hd: 4K sèvi ak ~4× lajè bann HD a.
haitian_creole.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3 g CO₂e pou chak demand tèks. Demand kontèks long (1M tokèn) koute ~3× plis.
haitian_creole.dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30 g pou chak imaj. 5–10× pi lou pase tèks.
haitian_creole.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500 g pou chak klip. Ogmante lineyèman ak longè klip la + rezolisyon. 50×+ pi lou pase tèks.
haitian_creole.elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3 g pou chak klip kout.
haitian_creole.copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: demand kòd kontèks long ~5 g chak.
haitian_creole.polyester_lifetime_of_oil_extraction: Polyestè = tout yon vi ekstraksyon petwòl.
haitian_creole.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Kenbe telefòn yo 3+ ane pou redwi enpak anyèl la mwatye.
haitian_creole.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Livrezon 2 jou = 3× sa yon livrezon pi dousman.
haitian_creole.shein_temu_avg_25_kg_per_order: Shein/Temu an mwayèn: 25 kg pou chak kòmann.
haitian_creole.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote_2: Dechaj yo pwodwi metàn (28× pi pwisan pase CO₂).
haitian_creole.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Evite metàn EPI bati kabòn nan tè a.
haitian_creole.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Dlo tiyo = ~500× pi pwòp sou plan emisyon.
haitian_creole.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Sa chak moun bezwen rive pou 2030 pou rete anba 1,5°C.
haitian_creole.low_carbon_lifestyle: Fason viv ki gen ba kabòn
haitian_creole.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Vil tankou Burlington, VT deja mache ak 100% elektrisite renouvlab!
haitian_creole.a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: Yon pòtfolyo divès se apwòch ki pi rezilyan an.
haitian_creole.wind_powered_future: Yon lavni ki mache ak van
haitian_creole.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Danmak deja jwenn 55% elektrisite li nan van.
haitian_creole.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Mond lan ajoute renouvlab pi vit pase tout tan.
haitian_creole.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Estab pandan 10.000 ane. Klima Olosèn kote tout sivilizasyon imèn grandi.
haitian_creole.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling kòmanse siveyans kontinyèl CO₂ nan Mauna Loa. Koub li pwouve rechofman ki koze pa moun te reyèl.
haitian_creole.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Syantis klima James Hansen di Kongrè Etazini rechofman kòmanse. 350.org konsidere 350 ppm kòm plafon «san danje» a.
haitian_creole.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Premye fwa CO₂ atmosferik depase 400 ppm nan 3+ milyon ane. Dènye epòk 400 ppm Latè: forè twopikal nan pòl yo.
haitian_creole.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Nivo aktyèl. Pi wo depi omwen 800.000 ane (dapre kawòt glas). Ekivalan ak ~1,2°C rechofman.
haitian_creole.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Sèy ki asosye ak 2°C rechofman si li kenbe. Objektif Akò Pari: rete anba 1,5°C.
haitian_creole.tropical_coral_reef_die_off: Lanmò an mas resif koray twopikal yo
haitian_creole.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Evènman blanchisman an mas koray yo frape Gran Baryè Koray la an 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022 ak 2024. Nan 1,5°C rechofman, 70–90% resif koray twopikal yo mouri. Nan 2°C, 99% mouri.
haitian_creole.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Kouch glas Greenland kenbe ase dlo pou fè nivo lanmè monte 7 mèt (23 ft). Nan ~1,5°C ki kenbe, fonn nan vin ireversib pandan syèk pou rive milenè.
haitian_creole.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Sikilasyon Meridyonal Ranvèsman Atlantik (AMOC) pote chalè soti nan twopik yo pou rive Ewòp. Li febli 15% depi 1950. Yon fèmen konplè ta refwadi nò Ewòp dramatikman pandan l ap deranje mouson yo an Afrik ak Azi.
haitian_creole.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon jenere mwatye pwòp lapli li. Ak 20–25% debwazman + tanperati k ap monte, li riske chanje soti nan forè twopikal pou rive savann. Kèk etid sijere sèy la pi pre 2°C ak to debwazman aktyèl yo.
haitian_creole.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Pèmafwòs Aktik kenbe de fwa kabòn ki nan atmosfè a kounye a. Pandan l ap chofe 3–4× pi vit pase mwayèn mondyal la, li deja ap dejle epi libere CO₂ ak metàn (28× pi pwisan pase CO₂ sou 100 an).
haitian_creole.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Kouch glas ki baze sou lanmè ki ankre anba nivo lanmè. Dlo cho lanmè a ap ewode yo pa anba. Glasye Thwaites la («Glasye Jou Jijman an») se pi gwo risk la. Efondreman li ta fè nivo lanmè monte 3,3 mèt (11 ft).
haitian_creole.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Forè konifè nò yo (Larisi, Kanada, Eskandinavi) strese anba rechofman, ensèk kòs ak dife. Yon tranzisyon konplè pou rive nan zèb ta ka libere gwo kantite kabòn ki estoke.
haitian_creole.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gòlf Maine chofe pi vit pase 99% oseyan mond lan depi 1980 — anviwon 0,5°F chak dekad, apeprè 3× mwayèn oseyan mondyal la. Kouran frèt Labrador la febli pandan dlo cho Gulf Stream la rive pi lwen nan nò, epi l ap restriktire chèn manje a nan fondman li an tan reyèl. Kominote kotyè Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet ak Mi’kmaq dokimante chanjman sa yo nan tradisyon oral dè dekad anvan satelit yo konfime yo.
haitian_creole.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Elektrisite ki pi bon mache nan mond lan an 2024. Kapasite a double chak ane nan plizyè rejyon.
haitian_creole.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Elektrisite ki pi bon mache nan istwa. Entegrasyon nan rezo a se pi gwo defi kounye a.
haitian_creole.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Distribye + rezilyan. Amòtisman tipik yon sistèm 5 kW: 6–10 an.
haitian_creole.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 manje gaspiye. Anpeche gaspiyaj evite metàn dechaj yo EPI emisyon pou pwodwi manje a.
haitian_creole.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Pa 100% vegan — menm redwi vyann bèf 3× pa semèn gen gwo enpak. Libere tè pou reboazman.
haitian_creole.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Restore 125M ekta. Pwoteje biyodivèsite + redwi CO₂ atravè fotosentèz.
haitian_creole.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Plante kote kondisyon natirèl ankouraje kwasans. Ko-benefis: refwadisman, pwoteksyon basen dlo.
haitian_creole.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Entegre pyebwa nan tè patiraj. Bèt yo jwenn lonbraj; tè a estoke 4× plis kabòn pase yon patiraj toutouni.
haitian_creole.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: San laboure + kilti kouvèti + wotasyon divès. Bati kabòn nan tè a pandan l ap kenbe randman.
haitian_creole.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Tè tourb estoke 3× plis kabòn pase forè yo nan lemond. Tourb ki drennen = gwo emetè.
haitian_creole.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: HFC yo 1.000–9.000× pi pwisan pase CO₂. Amannman Kigali (2016) ap elimine yo tikras pa tikras.
haitian_creole.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EV yo pwodwi 50–70% mwens emisyon pandan tout vi yo pase machin gazolin — amelyore pandan rezo a ap netwaye.
haitian_creole.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Tren elektrik deplase yon pasaje-km ak 1/10 emisyon yon machin.
haitian_creole.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Vil bisiklèt Olandè yo gen 1/3 emisyon transpò yo. Enfrastrikti a kreye konpòtman an.
haitian_creole.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Izolasyon + ponp chalè + limyè LED. Bilding Etazini yo sèvi ak 40% enèji primè a.
haitian_creole.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: 3–4× pi efikas pase founo gaz. Yo travay jiska −15°C nan modèl modèn pou klima frèt.
haitian_creole.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Toujou nan tèt klasman an. Fanm ki edike gen mwens timoun EPI lavi ki gen plis enpak. Li akimile atravè jenerasyon.
haitian_creole.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Ranplase dife bwa/chabon. Benefis: klima + polisyon lè andedan (touye 4M/ane) + debwazman.
haitian_creole.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Grandi 60× pi vit pase pyebwa tè. Sekestre CO₂ + restore lapèch + angrè.
haitian_creole.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Emisyon trè ba — Aliyen ak Pari
haitian_creole.very_high_fossil_fueled_growth: Trè wo — Kwasans ki mache ak fosil
haitian_creole.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Ale lekòl a pye, an bisiklèt oswa an bis
haitian_creole.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Eseye yon manje san vyann pa semèn
haitian_creole.turn_off_lights_unplug_chargers: Etenn limyè yo epi debranche chajè yo
haitian_creole.talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Pale ak fanmi ou sou chwa enèji yo
haitian_creole.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Plante yon pyebwa oswa kòmanse yon jaden lekòl
haitian_creole.write_a_letter_to_your_representative: Ekri yon lèt bay reprezantan ou
haitian_creole.start_a_recycling_program_at_school: Kòmanse yon pwogram resiklaj nan lekòl
haitian_creole.organize_a_climate_awareness_event: Òganize yon evènman konsyantizasyon sou klima
haitian_creole.climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Rakoursi klavye: 1 rive 6 chanje onglè, Q chanje kwiz la.
haitian_creole.export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Ekspòte rapò klima ou nan presse-papye
haitian_creole.hero_ppm: CO₂ jodi a: ~424 ppm — pi wo nan plis pase 3 milyon ane
haitian_creole.mission_panel_copy: Pase soti nan done pèsonèl pou rive nan prèv, jistis ak solisyon mondyal. Laboratwa avanse politik ak fòsaj yo rete disponib lè ou elaji yo.
haitian_creole.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Yon fwaye mwayen Etazini emèt ~16 tòn CO₂/ane. Pi gwo leve yo se chofaj kay, transpò ak rejim — pa pay plastik.
haitian_creole.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Solè + van kounye a pi bon mache pase nouvo santral fosil nan majorite mache yo. Pati difisil la se entegrasyon nan rezo a, pa pri jenerasyon.
haitian_creole.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Mezi kontinyèl CO₂ nan Mauna Loa depi 1958 — dosye atmosferik ki pi long. Modèl dan si a soti nan fotosentèz emisfè nò a.
haitian_creole.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Sèy kote sistèm nan chanje eta epi rete la — fonn Greenland, depeman Amazon, ralanti AMOC. Travay resan sijere plizyè pi pre pase yo te panse.
haitian_creole.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Peyi ki te emèt pi piti yo fè fas ak pi move enpak yo. Klima se an premye yon kesyon ekite — vilnerablite swiv revni, jeyografi ak responsablite istorik.
haitian_creole.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown klase 100 solisyon dapre gigatòn CO₂ ki evite. Frijorifik, gaspiyaj manje ak edikasyon tifi yo alatèt lis la — pa sa majorite moun panse.
haitian_creole.climate_policy_pathways_40_year_maine_: Chemen politik klima: kanpay 40 an nan Maine
haitian_creole.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Vizyalizasyon entèraktif graf donut anprent kabòn Climate Explorer
haitian_creole.interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Vizyalizasyon entèraktif kwonoloji emisyon Climate Explorer
haitian_creole.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Fikse nan ~1,5°C rechofman ki kenbe. Pifò adaptasyon kotyè toujou posib ak mi lanmè ak retrè jere.
haitian_creole.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Asosye ak ~2,5°C rechofman. Deplase plis moun pase nenpòt lagè nan istwa. Vag tanpèt siklòn yo vin katastwofik pou zòn andedan yo.
haitian_creole.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Pwobab pou 2300 nan 3°C. Nasyon antye pèdi teritwa vyab. New Orleans, Venice, anpil nan Vyetnam.
haitian_creole.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Angajman plizyè syèk nan 4°C rechofman. Mande efondreman Greenland + Antatik Lwès. Jeyografi kotyè sivilizasyon imèn reyekri pou tout tan.
haitian_creole.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Fikse ak Greenland + pifò Antatik Lwès disparèt. Yon kòt pi cho epòk Plyosèn. Soti nan plizyè syèk pou rive milenè pou reyalize nèt.
haitian_creole.record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Ane rekò — inondasyon Pakistan sèlman deplase ~8,2M moun
haitian_creole.welcome_the_people_the_climate_is_alre: Akeyi moun klima a deja ap deplase yo
haitian_creole.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Fè presyon pou monte angajman Fon Pèt ak Domaj la
haitian_creole.read_the_people_you_just_heard_from: Li sou moun ou fèk tande yo
haitian_creole.show_up_where_the_decisions_actually_g: Prezante kote desizyon yo reyèlman pran
haitian_creole.un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: Konvansyon Kad Nasyonzini sou Chanjman Klimatik
haitian_creole.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS pwopoze Pèt ak Domaj nan COP1 Bèlen
haitian_creole.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC kòmanse swiv deplasman akoz metewo
haitian_creole.paris_agreement_article_8_mentions_l_d: Akò Pari — Atik 8 mansyone Pèt ak Domaj
haitian_creole.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Desizyon CDH Nasyonzini nan Teitiota kont Nouvèl Zeland
haitian_creole.world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: Rapò Groundswell Pati II Bank Mondyal
haitian_creole.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — kreye Fon Pèt ak Domaj
haitian_creole.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubai — kapitalize Fon Pèt ak Domaj
haitian_creole.first_l_d_fund_disbursements: Premye desbousman Fon Pèt ak Domaj
haitian_creole.pick_the_biggest_impact_solution: Chwazi solisyon ki gen pi gwo enpak
haitian_creole.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Pa gen okenn gwo evènman politik oswa klimatik. Travay politik woutin nan kontinye.
haitian_creole.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Ou reyalize yon dekabonizasyon pwofon nan tout sektè yo, ou bati rezilyans epi ou kenbe ekite nan sant lan. Se konsa yon tranzisyon klimatik reyisi sanble lè kontra sosyal la kenbe.
haitian_creole.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Dekabonizasyon enpòtan nan sektè enèji ak transpò, men adaptasyon ak jistis rete dèyè. Koub kabòn yo kòrèk; kowalisyon politik la frajil.
haitian_creole.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Kèk sektè avanse. Lòt yo bloke. Sipò piblik la ewode ak tan. Sa a se trajektwa pifò politik klimatik reyèl yo swiv.
haitian_creole.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Dekabonizasyon bloke. Ekà adaptasyon yo elaji. Sipò piblik la efondre. Sa a se trajektwa nou travay pou evite: enpak klimatik ki akimile san enfrastrikti sosyal oswa teknik pou reponn.
haitian_creole.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Kondisyon inisyal yo fezab. Distribye envestisman an sou 2-3 sektè nan premye peryòd la pou jwenn ki règ fidbak ki deklanche an premye. Edikasyon piblik + asanble sitwayen bay rezilta dousman men dirab.
haitian_creole.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Fidbak pozitif domine; Latè chofe vè yon ekilib pi cho. (Yon vrè efè lasèr «san kontwòl» — ak oseyan yo k ap vapore — se yon senaryo Venis, pa Latè ak fòsaj sa yo.)
haitian_creole.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Albedo wo + fidbak negatif. Trajektwa laj glas.
haitian_creole.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Fòsaj yo konpanse pasyèlman. Klima a deplase dousman.
haitian_creole.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Dyagram balans enèji: limyè solè ond kout travèse kouch gaz efè lasèr la epi chofe sifas la; sifas la reyone enfrawouj, epi kouch gaz la absòbe yon pati epi reyemèt li anba, kenbe chalè.
haitian_creole.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Ipotèz: Kilè albedo depase fòsaj GES?
haitian_creole.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Eksplike kijan albedo, fidbak nyaj ak GES kondwi eta klima a ansanm.
